$description: Per-spec workflow state file. Created in Stage 2, updated every stage/task completion. Location: specification/[spec-index]-[spec-name]/[spec-index]-[spec-name]-workflow-tracking.json

featureName.$description: Human-readable name of the feature, fix, or refactor being implemented

specDirectory.$description: Relative path to the specification directory inside the worktree

worktreePath.$description: Relative path to the git worktree from the project root

startedAt.$description: Timestamp when the workflow was initialized (Stage 2 completion). Always use seconds precision.

stages.$description: Ordered list of all workflow stages and their execution status. Updated by Team Lead on stage start and completion.

id.$description: Stage identifier matching the workflow stage number (1, 2, 3, 3.5, 4, 4.5, 5, 6, 6.3, 6.4, 6.5, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 11.5, 12, 12.5, 13, 14)

status.$note: 'skipped' used for conditional stages like Stage 5 (bugs only) or Stage 6.3/6.4/6.5 selection

completedAt.$description: Timestamp when stage finished (null if not yet complete)

docs.$description: Spec documents produced by this stage (filenames only, relative to spec directory). Empty array for stages that produce no documents.

files.$description: Code/config files changed during this stage, categorized by operation. All paths relative to worktree root. Empty arrays for doc-only stages.

created.$description: Files newly created in this stage

modified.$description: Existing files modified in this stage

implementationPhases.$description: Tracks completion of each phase defined in the implementation-plan.md. Populated at Stage 9 entry by reading the plan. Even single-phase plans MUST have one entry. Team Lead verifies ALL entries are 'complete' before proceeding to Stage 11.

phaseNumber.$description: Phase number from the implementation plan (1, 2, 3, etc.)

name.$description: Phase name from the implementation plan

status.$note: 'implemented' = code written, gate-build passes. 'reviewed' = code review + adversarial pass. 'complete' = final state after both.

tasks.$description: Task IDs belonging to this phase (from implementation-plan)

startedAt.$description: Timestamp when this phase's implementation began

completedAt.$description: Timestamp when this phase passed review (null if not yet complete)

reviewIterations.$description: Number of Stage 9→10 review cycles for this phase. Target: < 3

tasks.$description: Individual work items within stages. Task IDs use format T{phase}.{seq} (e.g., T1.1, T1.2) matching implementation-plan phases. Updated on task start, file changes, and completion.

id.$description: Task identifier in T{phase}.{seq} format from implementation-plan

implementationPhase.$description: Implementation plan phase this task belongs to

files.$description: Code/config files changed by this task, categorized by operation. All paths relative to worktree root.

created.$description: Files newly created by this task

modified.$description: Existing files modified by this task

updatedAt.$description: Timestamp of last status or file list change

iteration.$description: Tracks Stage 9/10 review loops for the current implementation phase. Reset per phase.

currentPhase.$description: Which implementation plan phase is currently being worked on (1-indexed)

totalPhases.$description: Total number of implementation plan phases

loops.$description: Number of Stage 9 → 10 iteration cycles for the current phase. 0 means first pass. Target: < 3 loops per phase

lastReviewVerdict.$description: Most recent combined verdict from Stage 10 (code-reviewer + adversarial-reviewer). null before first review.
lastReviewVerdict.$note: Code review uses Approved/Changes Requested/Blocked. Adversarial uses PASS/CONTESTED/REJECT. Record the blocking verdict.

team.$description: Agent team metadata and communication log for the workflow session.

name.$description: Team name, always 'super-dev-[spec-name]' (each spec gets its own dedicated team)

teammates.$description: List of teammate agent types that have been spawned during this workflow (for audit, not live status)

messages.$description: Key inter-agent messages logged for traceability (not exhaustive, only significant coordination events)

to.$description: Receiver agent type or 'all' for broadcast

status.$description: Top-level workflow completion flags. Team Lead sets these during Stage 12-13 transition.

allStagesComplete.$description: True when all required stages (including 11, 11.5, 12) have status 'complete' or 'skipped'. Set during Stage 12.

allTasksComplete.$description: True when every task in the tasks array has status 'complete'. Set during Stage 12.

workflowDone.$description: True after Stage 13 commit succeeds. Final flag indicating the workflow is fully finished.
